summary: Fair matrix recording with noticeable time‑delay glitches on Jerry’s lead, but a tasty Rider transition and smoking TLEO keep the 1982 show enjoyable.
review: The performance is generally praised – the long, tasty segue into the Rider medley and a smoking TLEO (Truckin' > Little ...?) are highlighted as stand‑outs. The matrix mix, however, suffers from delay problems on Jerry’s lead and occasional hot vocals/low bass that detract from an otherwise solid show.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated high (good to very good) while recording quality is mixed/fair due to matrix timing and mix issues; the weighted average yields a ~4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Time‑delay artifacts on Jerry's lead in TLEO, hot vocal levels, imperfect keyboard balance and occasional low/no bass typical of early‑80s matrix mixes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Smooth pacing with a long, tasty transition into the Rider medley; overall flow praised despite minor performance glitches.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Raspy vocal tone appreciated; lead guitar suffers from time‑delay issues in TLEO.
